backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a clinic management system with access control, user profiles, patient registration, doctor management, appointments, and medical records with authorization checks on all operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four branding updates to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' across index.html, Layout.tsx header/footer, and LoginPage.tsx with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the clinic app's React components, pages, hooks, routing, styling, and branding updates.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS global styles with OKLCH color system defining medical-themed design tokens for light and dark modes with comprehensive CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title set to 'Mannosalva Clinic App' and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router configuration, authentication flow, profile setup modal, and route definitions for all clinic pages (dashboard, patients, appointments, medical records).
frontend/src/components/AppointmentCalen: Monthly calendar component displaying appointments by day with color-coded appointment types, patient names, navigation controls, and overflow handling for multiple appointments per day.
List component showing upcoming appointments sorted chronologically with patient details, date/time display, appointment type badges, and cancel functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing navigation header with links to Dashboard, Patients, and Appointments pages, plus logout functionality and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form component allowing users to enter their name, select a role (doctor/staff/admin), and optionally specify a specialty for doctors.
frontend/src/components/VisitNoteCard.ts: Card component displaying a single visit note with diagnosis, clinical notes, prescriptions, visit time, and appointment ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, patients, appointments, and visit notes from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom medical-themed color palette (green/white) for both light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddVisitNote.tsx: Form page for adding visit notes to patient records, including appointment selection, diagnosis, notes, and multiple prescriptions with dynamic add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Appointments.tsx: Appointments overview page displaying a calendar view and list of upcoming appointments with a button to schedule new appointments.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying summary statistics (total patients, appointments, records) and quick action buttons for common tasks like registering patients and scheduling appointments.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page with Internet Identity login integration, displaying clinic branding and a login button.
frontend/src/pages/MedicalRecords.tsx: Patient medical records page showing all visit notes sorted by date with options to add new visit notes.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDetail.tsx: Detailed patient view displaying patient information, appointments, and visit notes with navigation to medical records.
frontend/src/pages/Patients.tsx: Patient list page with search functionality and grid display of all registered patients with links to individual patient details.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPatient.tsx: Patient registration form component that captures name, contact info, and medical record number with auto-generation capability, then navigates to patients list on successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/ScheduleAppointment.t: Appointment scheduling form component that allows selecting a patient, entering doctor name, date/time, and appointment type, converting datetime to BigInt nanoseconds for backend submission.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (including medical-themed colors), typography, animations, and design tokens using OKLCH color space for the clinic application UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for the Mannosalva Clinic App including patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical records management, and branding updates across the application.
